issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The card prevents a rested character from becoming active next Refresh Phase, which is a conditional effect preventing state change, not a Rest action. This requires a custom/special effect type or a duration-based condition that blocks activation during opponent's next Refresh Phase.

Missing duration specification. Text '...will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase' indicates a delayed conditional effect lasting through opponent's next Refresh Phase, not an immediate action.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incomplete. Card specifies 'rested Characters', so condition must include HasRestingDon check.
